title: Add tweetnacl dependency to frontend

requirements.text: Add the `tweetnacl` npm package as a dependency in the frontend project (update the frontend package manifest and lockfile as applicable) so frontend TypeScript code can import it (e.g., `import nacl from "tweetnacl"`).

quotes: Add tweetnacl as a dependency to the frontend project.

acceptanceCriteria: Frontend dependencies include `tweetnacl` (listed under dependencies in the frontend package manifest).
A production frontend build succeeds with a simple `import nacl from "tweetnacl"` usage (no missing-module errors).

constraints: Do not modify any immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui/*.
nonGoals: Do not change Ed25519 key generation logic in ConnectBotWizardModal as part of this request.
Do not add any backend changes.
